//: Motion map template — maps AvatarState to Spine animation names.
TypeScript schema (copy target must stay valid JSON):
import type { AvatarState, MotionMap, MotionMapEntry } from "@mimica/shared";
// MotionMapEntry: packages/shared/src/avatar.ts
// AvatarState keys: packages/shared/src/chat.ts
// Runtime: packages/character-runtime/src/CharacterDirector.ts, SpineStageController.ts
Deploy path (default): ~/MimicaAssets/characters/rio/motion-map.json
List skeleton animations: pnpm --filter @mimica/character-runtime extract-animations -- <path>.skel
Top-level keys = AvatarState: idle | thinking | talking | waiting | success | error
Each value is a MotionMapEntry:
State transition semantics (CharacterDirector.setState → SpineStageController.playState):
loop:true — persistent loop states: idle, thinking, waiting, talking
Entered only by explicit setState() / setAvatarState() (agent events, UI, dev preview).
Animation loops until the next setState(); do not use returnTo (ignored when loop is true).
loop:false — one-shot reactions: success, error
Play animations[0] once; on complete, auto setAvatarState(returnTo) when returnTo is set.
This template uses returnTo "idle" for success and error.
returnTo omitted (loop:false only):
No auto-return; AvatarState stays on success/error until the next explicit setState().
loop omitted defaults to true (entry?.loop ?? true in SpineStageController).
loop (boolean, required)
true  — see persistent loop states above.
false — see one-shot reactions above; pair with returnTo for auto-return.
animations (string[], required)
Spine animation names from the .skel. Runtime plays animations[0] only.
Put the preferred clip first; extra entries are reserved for future rotation.
If empty, fallback (then idle) is used.
fallback (string[], optional)
Used when animations is empty or missing clips. First name wins.
Example: thinking uses Look_01_M with fallback Start_Idle_01.
returnTo (AvatarState, optional)
loop:false only — target state after one-shot completes (typically "idle").
Ignored when loop is true. Omitted → no automatic transition (see above).
Animation naming (Blue Archive / CH0158_home convention — not validated in code):
_M  — body motion loops (e.g. Look_01_M, Talk_02_M, LookEnd_01_M).
_A  — action / expression one-shots (e.g. Pat_01_A, LookEnd_01_A).
*End* — paired end clip for a motion (PatEnd_01_A after Pat_01_A).
No suffix — neutral idle/base (e.g. Start_Idle_01).
CH####_* — scene-specific clips; verify with extract-animations before use.
Minimal entry example:
"thinking": { "loop": true, "animations": ["Look_01_M"], "fallback": ["Start_Idle_01"] }
Remove this "//" key after copy if you prefer a state-only file (runtime ignores it).
